caption: A news broadcast shows a group of men standing together outdoors. A man in a white kurta-pyjama stands centrally, flanked by other men in formal attire, including suits and vests. Several people appear in small circular inset images on the screen, identified by text such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "विजय चौधरी", and "श्रवण कुमार". The News18 India logo is visible in the upper right corner of every frame. A red banner at the top contains the text "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है", while a yellow banner at the bottom states "जे. पी. नड्डा: बिहार में NDA क्लीन स्वीप करेगा". As the clip progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and the identifying labels for the people in the inset images and the main scene change, with "डिप्टी CM" and "विजय सिन्हा" appearing in the final frame. The timestamp "10:06 PM" remains constant throughout.
